name: Sadducee of the Council
oracleText:
When Sadducee of the Council enters the battlefield, scry 2.
Whenever you draw your second card each turn, exile target card from a graveyard.
flavorText: "Ye do err, not knowing the scriptures." — Matthew 22:29
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; mechanics, colors, and art sourcing remain pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Sebald Beham's "Christ before Caiaphas" via Wikimedia Commons. First-pass mechanics added in this pass; mana, colors, and rules text remain provisional.

classics.license: Public domain; NGA Commons file for a faithful reproduction of a public-domain engraving.
classics.sourceNotes: Caiaphas before the council is the closest classic visual shorthand for this card.
